# testdata

This directory contains reproducible test inputs and reference outputs.

## Layout

- `models/` — gitignored; fetched by `make download-assets`.
- `corpora/` — gitignored; fetched by `make download-assets`.
- `golden/` — committed; small JSON fixtures generated by `make diff-test` from `corpora/` via the Python reference env. Used by Go unit tests in `internal/diff/`.

## Regenerating

```bash
make bootstrap-ref     # one-time
make download-assets   # one-time
make diff-test         # regenerates golden/*.json
```

## Why not check in the model?

`en_core_web_sm` is ~12 MB and changes per upstream release. We pin the version via `UPSTREAM` and re-download deterministically.
